name: Chrono
description: Square's time-travel RPG series beginning with Chrono Trigger and continuing through Radical Dreamers and Chrono Cross.

eras.title: Dream Team Era
eras.description: Chrono Trigger and Radical Dreamers establish the series' time-travel identity and connection between worlds.

eras.title: Chrono Cross Era
eras.description: Chrono Cross expands the setting with parallel worlds, a larger cast, and a different structure from Chrono Trigger.

eras.title: Legacy Revival Era
eras.description: Ports, remasters, and re-releases preserve the series without a major new entry.
